title: Full House Resorts Announces Third Quarter Earnings Release Date
author: Lewis Fanger
description: Full House Resorts will report its Q3 2025 financial results on November 6, 2025, with a conference call at 2:00 p.m. ET, providing investors with live audio webcast and replay options.

insights.sentiment_reasoning: The article is a standard financial results announcement without explicit positive or negative performance indicators, presenting routine investor communication

title: Full House Resorts Announces Appointment of Joshua Le Duff as  Senior Vice President and Chief Marketing Officer
author: N/A
description: Full House Resorts has appointed Joshua Le Duff as its new Senior Vice President and Chief Marketing Officer, who has extensive experience in the casino industry. The company has also granted him an inducement equity award as part of his hiring.

insights.sentiment_reasoning: The article announces the appointment of a new senior executive, which is generally seen as a positive development for the company as it brings in experienced leadership to drive growth and marketing initiatives.

title: Full House Resorts Announces Fourth Quarter and Full-Year Results
author: Full House Resorts, Inc.
description: - Revenues Increased 66.4% to $60.0 Million in the Fourth Quarter of 2023;Annual Revenues Grew 47.6%

title: Full House Resorts Announces Fourth Quarter Earnings Release Date
author: Full House Resorts, Inc.
description: LAS VEGAS, Feb.  09, 2024  (GLOBE NEWSWIRE) -- Full House Resorts (NASDAQ: FLL) announced today that it will report its fourth quarter 2023 and full-year financial results on Tuesday, March 5, 2024, followed by a conference call at 4:30 p.m. ET (1:30 p.m. PT). Investors can access the live audio webcast from the Company’s website at www.fullhouseresorts.com under the investor relations section. The conference call can also be accessed by dialing (201) 689-8470.

title: Chamonix, Colorado’s Newest and Most Luxurious Casino Hotel, Opens at Noon on Wednesday, December 27, 2023
author: Full House Resorts, Inc.
description: Located in charming Cripple Creek, Chamonix is conveniently located less than an hour from Colorado Springs and approximately two hours from Denver
